title: CI Artifacts task failing & Windows download link broken
body:
### Issue Description

The https://github.com/containers/podman/pull/19349 PR made changes to output files.  However, it missed making corresponding changes to the `artifacts` CI script and a link in the documentation pointing at the file.

### Steps to reproduce the issue

Steps to reproduce the issue
1. [Observe artifacts task failure on `main` (log)](https://cirrus-ci.com/task/5193709495517184)
2. Click "Windows podman-remote for x86_64 only." link [on DOWNLOADS page](https://github.com/n1hility/podman/blob/2f21df7b3a767f1efabe5ef16031d5d61e61a5bd/DOWNLOADS.md)

### Describe the results you received

1. Daily CI runs on `main` fail in artifacts task
2. Get 404 when clicking download link

### Describe the results you expected

1. Daily CI runs on `main` should always pass
2. Documentation should not contain bad links

### podman info output

```yaml
N/A
```


### Podman in a container

No

### Privileged Or Rootless

None

### Upstream Latest Release

Yes

### Additional environment details

N/A

### Additional information

Both these items were added as a potential aid to downstream users or automation.  However, I am unaware of, and doubtful that anybody/anything actually depends on the windows binary CI artifact.  I'm totally fine if the fix here is to simply remove the broken things.

comments.body: @n1hility if you're busy, I'm happy to remove the broken things.  Offering this issue up to you in case you have a itch to fix them.  If not, let me know.
@cevich sorry for the regression, somehow I missed the artifacts failure on the PR
No worries, it's status is masked/ignored on PRs soas to not interfere with more important updates.
